query:
UPDATE suppliers 
SET description = TRIM(
  REGEXP_REPLACE(
    REGEXP_REPLACE(
      REGEXP_REPLACE(
        description,
        '<!--[[:space:]]*/?(wp:[^>]*)-->',
        ''
      ),
      '[[:space:]]{3,}',
      ' '
    ),
    '^[[:space:]]+|[[:space:]]+$',
    ''
  )
)
WHERE description IS NOT NULL AND description LIKE '%<!-- wp:%';
